title: Love Knot Beef Kidney
description: A fresh and tender Korean dish featuring beef kidney, designed to be romantic with a touch of spice for an easy yet delicious meal.
instructions: Clean and thinly slice the beef kidney.
Mix Korean Chili Paste with Soy Sauce to make a sauce.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add sliced kidney, sauté for about 3 minutes or until lightly browned.
Add ginger and garlic, cook for another minute.
Pour the sauce mixture into the pan, stir well to coat kidney evenly.
Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until the kidney is tender but still slightly chewy.
Garnish with finely chopped green onions before serving.
